scope: HESEM Master Data Authority Platform content only

browser_publish_model.source_boundary_decision: Do not commit runtime dashboard under mom/docs/system/agent-reports because RepoBoundaryScanner classifies it as generated_report.

deployment_findings.finding: MDA V1/P00-P21 artifact directory is present on the VPS with 182 tracked files and no dirty modifications.
Raw _reports paths return HTTP 403 in the browser, so repository artifacts existed on the server but were not publishable as web content before a runtime HTML dashboard was added.
MDA V4 runtime-closure branch artifacts are not on production main; they remain in the separate recovery branch and must not be treated as deployed runtime closure.
Production VPS working tree has unrelated dirty files. This audit avoids overwriting them and only publishes a runtime MDA dashboard copy.

The first tracked dashboard location violated the repo source-boundary gate; source evidence now lives under the allowlisted _reports/agent-audits path, while the Chrome-facing HTML copy remains runtime-published only.

acceptance_posture.claim: The MDA prompt OS sequence is complete as a design-and-governance package, not runtime-complete.
